nasb.text: She said to her husband, “Behold now, I perceive that this is a holy man of God passing by us continually.

esv.text: And she said to her husband, “Behold now, I know that this is a holy man of God who is continually passing our way.

cnv.text: 那婦人對她的丈夫說：“你看，我知道那常從我們這裡經過的，是個聖潔的神人。

ccb.text: 那妇人对丈夫说：“我看常路过我们这里的这位是上帝圣洁的仆人。他常路过我们这里，
